title: 8" Bricklayers Trowel – Pointed Carbon Steel Blade with Wooden Handle – Ideal for Bricklaying, Cement Spreading & Masonry Work
features: DURABLE CARBON STEEL BLADE – Features a pointed carbon steel blade for precise cement and mortar spreading during bricklaying tasks.
CLASSIC WOODEN HANDLE – Equipped with a smooth wooden handle for a traditional feel, providing comfort and firm grip during use.
PERFECT FOR MASONRY WORK – Ideal for laying bricks, shaping mortar, and detailed masonry applications on both small and large projects.
STRONG & RELIABLE BUILD – Built for long-lasting use with strong riveted construction between blade and handle for added durability.
VERSATILE USE – Suitable for professional bricklayers, construction workers, and DIY enthusiasts handling brick or block work.
